_meta.name: meditation-extended-knowledge
_meta.purpose: 扩 9 场景交叉页（crystals×新场景），补现有 9 交叉页（focus/sleep/emotional/grounding/beginners/manifestation/script/room/best）→ 共 18
_meta.note: 不与现有 9 交叉页 + 14 主词页（how-to-meditate/types/mindfulness/benefits/techniques/walking/chakra/third-eye/breath/loving-kindness/body-scan/transcendental/postures/how-long）重复
_meta.framework: 03-内容策略/内容Brief/模板-Meditation文章框架.md v2（沿用现有 meditation-knowledge.json 场景结构）

serp_evidence.method: serp_check us/en/mobile 对 11 个候选词；筛选标准 = 真实竞品文章生态（剔除大平台/空 SERP）

rejected.stress: SERP 空结果（anxiety 已覆盖相近意图）
rejected.visualization: SERP 多平台（Reddit/Facebook/Amazon），缺独立竞品文章
rejected.healing: 与现有 best-crystals-for-meditation 高度重叠
rejected.new-moon: SERP 强但与现有 manifestation 场景重叠（皆为 intention-setting），选 shadow-work 替补（完全独特深度场景）
rejected.sleep-for-adults: 与现有 sleep 场景重叠
rejected.pain-relief: 医疗合规风险高，留待后续

_meta.compliance_baseline: support / invite / gentle companion / mindful anchor / wind-down；禁 cures/heals/treats anxiety/depression/trauma/ptsd/grief（grief 改 'gentle companion for loss'）
_meta.eastern_accuracy: shamatha/vipassana=南传上座部；Metta=南传；Dzogchen/Mahamudra/Chöd=藏传；nyasa/sankalpa=瑜伽坦特罗；kinhin/zazen=禅宗；子午卯酉=道家内丹活子时。按场景选准确术语不混贴
_meta.meaning_url_pattern: /gemstone/{meaning_slug}-meaning/（只链已验证 200 的，未上线不强链）
_meta.crystal_slug_source: 沿用 meditation-knowledge.json crystal_pool 已验证 slug；新增 slug（blue-lace-agate/sunstone/lapis-lazuli/red-jasper/green-aventurine/sodalite/blue-apatite/rhodonite/black-obsidian/malachite）为 390 库常见英文 slug

mainpages.title: Crystals for Anxiety Meditation: 7 Calming Stones & a 6-Step Wind-Down
mainpages.h1: How to Use Crystals for an Anxiety Meditation Practice
mainpages.definition: An anxiety meditation uses a tactile anchor (a calming crystal), slow extended exhalation, and a gentle attentional resting point to support the mind when it feels sped up. This guide covers seven stones traditionally paired with this kind of wind-down, plus a six-step script anyone can follow.

scene.pain_point: racing thoughts, chest tightness, looping worry, difficulty exhaling fully
scene.breath: coherent breath (inhale 4, exhale 6 — longer exhale signals settling; do not hold if it adds tension)
scene.hold_hand: left (traditionally the receiving side, inviting calm in)
scene.scan_focus: base of the throat and center of the chest (where worry often lands)
scene.visualization: a wide slow river carrying worried thoughts past, without trying to stop them
scene.affirmation: I can let the mind settle, one long exhale at a time.
scene.compliance_phrasing: a calming companion for anxious moments / wind-down support (NOT cures / treats / heals anxiety or anxiety disorders)

steps.name: Settle with the coherent breath
steps.text: inhale through the nose for 4, exhale through the mouth for 6 — repeat six rounds; if the count adds tension, just make the exhale longer than the inhale

steps.name: Hold the stone in the left palm
steps.text: feel its temperature and weight; let the cool or smooth surface be a single point of contact

steps.name: Soften the jaw and drop the shoulders
steps.text: anxiety often grips these two places first; on each exhale, let them release a little more

steps.name: Rest attention at the base of the throat
steps.text: the place where the breath turns; if the mind races, return there, no judgment

steps.name: Set a one-line intention
steps.text: "I can let the mind settle, one long exhale at a time."

steps.name: Close by noticing the floor
steps.text: feel the contact of feet or seat before opening the eyes; transition slowly, not standing up abruptly

crystal_rationale.amethyst: 传统 calm 主题；紫色作视觉柔和焦点，含天然铁致色（科学角度）
crystal_rationale.lepidolite: 含天然锂云母类矿物（科学事实，非药理断言）；柔和淡紫色调传统上与 settled state 关联
crystal_rationale.blue-lace-agate: 蓝色带状纹路作视觉柔和锚；脉轮传统中常与 throat center 关联
crystal_rationale.howlite: 白色多孔质地，传统睡前 / 风暴心智用途；柔白作视觉减压
crystal_rationale.black-tourmaline: 重量感（高比重）作触觉锚，传统 grounding 用途
crystal_rationale.moonstone: adularescence 浮动光，给眼睛一个 non-fixed 流动焦点（不固定 = 不执着）
crystal_rationale.selenite: 半透长柱状，作 'resting place' 物件；质地极软（Mohs 2）只能持不能盘玩

faq_seeds: What are the best crystals for anxiety meditation?
How do I meditate with crystals for anxiety?
How long should an anxiety meditation be?
Can I hold more than one crystal for anxiety?
Which crystal should I wear daily for anxious moments?
Do I need to cleanse crystals after an anxious practice?
Is there scientific evidence crystals help anxiety?
Are crystals a substitute for anxiety treatment?
mainpages.eastern_note: 南传：anapanasati 长呼气版（佛陀教导风灾 / worry 的对治是 awareness of long breath）；藏传 Medicine Buddha 传统以蓝色 / 紫色石作 calm 支持（非医疗）；道家 '松'（释放）为对治 '紧'（焦虑体感）—皆为冥想支持而非医疗断言
mainpages.differentiation_from_existing: vs sleep (M2): sleep 用 4-7-8 + crown；anxiety 用 coherent 4-6 + throat（不同 breath/chakra）；vs emotional (M3): emotional 是 general held feelings，anxiety 特指 sped-up worry loops

mainpages.title: Crystals for Morning Meditation: 7 Stones to Begin the Day With Intention
mainpages.h1: How to Build a Morning Meditation with Crystals
mainpages.definition: A morning crystal meditation is a short intention-setting practice done within the first hour of waking, using warm or bright stones as tactile cues for how you want to meet the day. This guide covers seven stones traditionally paired with morning practice, plus a six-step morning script.

scene.pain_point: grogginess, immediately reaching for the phone, entering the day reactively instead of by choice
scene.breath: awakening breath (deep inhale through the nose, brief hold at the top, full exhale through the mouth with a soft 'ha')
scene.hold_hand: right (traditionally the activating / projective side, paired with 'meeting the day')
scene.scan_focus: solar plexus (just above the navel) and the crown of the head
scene.visualization: low warm morning light filling the body from the feet upward, like dawn rising
scene.duration: 5-12 min within first hour of waking
scene.affirmation: I meet today from a chosen intention, not from reaction.
scene.compliance_phrasing: intention-setting morning ritual / awakening practice (NOT guarantees success / boosts productivity)

steps.name: Before the phone, pick up the stone
steps.text: within the first hour of waking; even before getting out of bed is fine

steps.name: Three awakening breaths
steps.text: deep inhale through the nose, brief natural hold, full exhale through the mouth with a soft 'ha' — repeat three times

steps.name: Hold the stone in the right hand over the solar plexus
steps.text: just above the navel; feel the warmth of the hand meeting the stone

steps.name: Set one intention for the day
steps.text: not a to-do item — one phrase for how you want to meet today (e.g. 'steady', 'kind', 'clear')

steps.name: Picture low morning light rising
steps.text: a warm dawn light filling the body from feet to crown, slow and unhurried

steps.name: Close by setting the stone somewhere visible
steps.text: desk, pocket, or wrist — a tactile reminder of the morning intention through the day

crystal_rationale.citrine: 暖黄橙色（铁致色）作 dawn light 视觉锚；传统 'sun-stone' 联想
crystal_rationale.carnelian: 透橙红色蜡状光泽作 gentle activation 视觉；古埃及 / 罗马传统 vitality 联想
crystal_rationale.sunstone: aventurescence 闪光（日光效应）作 morning sparkle；太阳联想直接
crystal_rationale.clear-quartz: 中性无色作 blank-slate intention 载体；piezoelectric 科学事实
crystal_rationale.selenite: EnergyMuse / TinyRituals 等多源推荐 'start day with selenite'；长柱形作 wand-like awakening 工具
crystal_rationale.tiger-eye: chatoyancy 移动眼线作 steady alertness；grounded confidence 视觉
crystal_rationale.green-aventurine: 淡绿柔和色作 opportunity / growth 联想；早晨 'fresh start' 传统

faq_seeds: What are the best crystals for a morning meditation?
How do I start a morning crystal ritual?
How long should my morning meditation be?
Should I use a different crystal each morning?
Which crystal should I wear through the day after a morning meditation?
Can I do a morning meditation in bed?
Is morning the best time to meditate with crystals?
Do I need to cleanse morning crystals differently?
mainpages.eastern_note: 道家每日子午时（子时 23-1 / 午时 11-13）为传统静坐窗口；藏传黎明修法（'dawn practice' 在 Medicine Buddha / Tara 传统中重要）；印度瑜伽 sunrise sandhya（晨昏交接修法）—皆传统时间学，非泛养生
mainpages.differentiation_from_existing: vs manifestation (M6): manifestation 是 active goal-alignment（rising breath + solar plexus + aim realized）；morning 是 time-of-day ritual（awakening breath + dawn light + how-I-meet-today）；vs beginners (M5): beginners 教方法，morning 是 ritual 应用

mainpages.title: Crystals for Self-Love Meditation: 7 Stones for a Heart-Centered Practice
mainpages.h1: How to Use Crystals for a Self-Love Meditation
mainpages.definition: A self-love meditation is a heart-centered practice of directing warmth, patience, and acceptance toward yourself, often using a pink or green stone over the heart center as a tactile anchor. This guide covers seven stones traditionally paired with self-directed compassion work.

scene.pain_point: inner critic, harsh self-judgment, feeling unworthy of care, difficulty receiving kindness
scene.breath: heart breath (slow inhale into the chest as if breathing into the heart, soft exhale with a gentle half-smile)
scene.visualization: a soft warm pink or green light expanding outward from the heart with each inhale, surrounding the body
scene.affirmation: I am worth the warmth I would offer a friend.
scene.compliance_phrasing: self-directed warmth / heart-centered practice (NOT heals low self-esteem / treats self-worth disorders)

steps.name: Settle with the heart breath
steps.text: slow inhale into the chest as if filling the heart, soft exhale with a gentle half-smile — repeat five rounds

steps.name: Place the stone over the heart center
steps.text: left hand resting on the sternum, stone beneath the palm or between both hands

steps.name: Silently offer yourself one kind phrase
steps.text: "May I be gentle with myself today." — said silently, three times, slowly

steps.name: Picture soft pink or green light at the heart
steps.text: expanding outward with each inhale, like a warm halo surrounding you

steps.name: If the inner critic rises, name it kindly
steps.text: "that is the critic speaking" — return to the stone's weight and the kind phrase, no arguing with it

steps.name: Close by placing a hand on the heart
steps.text: before lifting the stone, place your free hand over the first and feel the warmth of your own two hands for three breaths

crystal_rationale.rose-quartz: 传统跨文化 heart / gentleness 联想；柔和粉色作视觉温润焦点；自然 palm stone 形状契合 hand-curve
crystal_rationale.rhodochrosite: 粉白带纹；现代传统中 self-compassion 主题（与 rose-quartz 相近但更内省）
crystal_rationale.moonstone: adularescence 浮动光作 'mirror of the inner self' 视觉；新开始联想
crystal_rationale.amethyst: 传统 calm 主题；softening the inner critic 支持
crystal_rationale.green-aventurine: 淡绿柔和；heart-secondary 传统（绿与粉皆配 heart center）
crystal_rationale.rhodonite: 粉黑对比；现代传统 self-forgiveness / inner-wound 主题
crystal_rationale.citrine: 暖黄作 self-warmth 联想（非仅 manifestation）；'sun on the inside' 视觉

faq_seeds: What are the best crystals for self-love meditation?
How is self-love meditation different from loving-kindness?
How do I meditate on self-love with crystals?
Which chakra is for self-love?
Can I do a self-love meditation every day?
What if I feel worse during a self-love meditation?
Which crystal should I wear for self-love?
Do I need to program a crystal for self-love?
mainpages.eastern_note: 与 14 主词页 'loving-kindness' 的关键区别：loving-kindness (metta) 是南传 formal 序列（self→loved→neutral→difficult→all beings）；self-love 是 Western 当代 framing，专注 self-directed heart warmth（无 formal 序列，可单独作）。术语区分：'metta phrases' 是南传 Pali；'self-compassion' 是当代心理学（Kristin Neff 等）。
mainpages.differentiation_from_existing: vs emotional (M3): emotional 是 general held feelings release（sighing breath + flowing water）；self-love 是 self-directed warmth（heart breath + soft light expansion）；vs loving-kindness (主词页): metta formal 序列包含 5 方向，self-love 专注 self 一个方向但更深

mainpages.title: Crystals for Confidence Meditation: 7 Stones for Inner Steadiness
mainpages.h1: How to Use Crystals for a Confidence Meditation
mainpages.definition: A confidence meditation uses a warm, weighted, or reflective stone, steady breath, and a felt sense of one's own capacity to support meeting challenges from a grounded center rather than a braced front. This guide covers seven stones traditionally paired with this kind of steadying practice.

scene.pain_point: self-doubt, imposter feelings, bracing before a challenge, shrinking in front of others
scene.breath: steady power breath (inhale 4, hold gently for 2 at the top, exhale 4 — even ratio, no forcing)
scene.hold_hand: right over the solar plexus (just above the navel)
scene.scan_focus: solar plexus (will / aligned action) and the soles of the feet (ground)
scene.visualization: a low steady sun at the solar plexus, not flashy — a warm steady glow, grounded
scene.affirmation: I meet this from a steady center, not a braced front.
scene.compliance_phrasing: inner steadiness practice / aligned-action support (NOT cures low self-esteem / guarantees success)

steps.name: Settle with the steady power breath
steps.text: inhale 4, hold 2 at the top without strain, exhale 4 — repeat six rounds

steps.name: Hold the stone in the right hand over the solar plexus
steps.text: just above the navel; feel the warmth of the hand and the weight of the stone

steps.name: Press the feet into the floor
steps.text: confidence is not 'up' — it is grounded; press feet gently and feel the support

steps.name: Picture a low steady sun at the solar plexus
steps.text: not flashy, not bright — a warm stable glow that doesn't flicker

steps.name: Set the one-line intention
steps.text: "I meet this from a steady center, not a braced front." — say silently three times

steps.name: Close by touching the stone once and standing tall
steps.text: press the stone gently, set it down, roll the shoulders back, and step into the next moment

crystal_rationale.tiger-eye: chatoyancy 移动眼线作 'steady gaze' 视觉；传统跨文化 grounded alertness 联想
crystal_rationale.carnelian: 透橙红色作 gentle activation（非 aggression）；古埃及 / 罗马 courage 传统
crystal_rationale.citrine: 暖黄作 steady sun 视觉；非仅 manifestation，亦是 identity-warmth
crystal_rationale.sunstone: 日光效应闪光作 confidence-spark 视觉；乐观联想
crystal_rationale.pyrite: 金属金色立方晶体作 'sun-stone' mineral counterpart；重量感 + 反射光
crystal_rationale.red-jasper: 土红色 opaque；grounded endurance 传统；earth-toned steadiness
crystal_rationale.hematite: 金属重（高比重）作触觉 anchor；'weight in hand = ground in body' 直接感受

faq_seeds: What are the best crystals for confidence meditation?
How is confidence meditation different from manifestation?
Which chakra is for confidence?
How long should a confidence meditation be?
Can I meditate for confidence before public speaking?
Which crystal should I wear for daily confidence?
Do confidence crystals need to be cleansed differently?
Is there evidence crystals help confidence?
mainpages.eastern_note: 瑜伽：manipura (solar plexus) 为 fire / will 中心；藏传：kriya 传统 body-speech-mind 对齐（'aligned action' 非 'aggressive push'）；道家中正之气（不偏不倚）—'steady center' 是跨传统共通 framing。注意：confidence 在东方传统中常并入 'right action / dharma' 而非独立的 self-concept。
mainpages.differentiation_from_existing: vs manifestation (M6): manifestation 是 active goal-alignment（aim realized in body）；confidence 是 identity-steadiness（steady center 不为特定目标）；vs self-love (E3): self-love 是 self-warmth（heart），confidence 是 self-trust（solar plexus + root）

mainpages.title: Crystals for Creativity Meditation: 7 Stones to Open Creative Flow
mainpages.h1: How to Use Crystals for a Creativity Meditation
mainpages.definition: A creativity meditation uses warm orange or iridescent stones, a flowing or rhythmic breath, and an open attentional field (not single-pointed) to soften the critic and invite novel connections. This guide covers seven stones traditionally paired with creative practice.

scene.pain_point: creative block, perfectionism, fear of the blank page, second-guessing mid-flow
scene.breath: flowing breath (alternating-nostril style or rhythmic inhale 4 / exhale 4, soft and unforced)
scene.hold_hand: left (the receiving side, inviting images and ideas in)
scene.scan_focus: sacral (lower belly, below the navel) and the third-eye (between the brows)
scene.visualization: a warm orange pool of water in the lower belly, gently rising as a fountain up to the brow
scene.affirmation: I make space, and something new arrives.
scene.compliance_phrasing: creative practice support / opening attention (NOT boosts IQ / enhances intelligence)

steps.name: Settle with flowing breath
steps.text: soft rhythmic inhale 4, exhale 4 — or alternate-nostril if you know it; nothing forced

steps.name: Hold the stone in the left palm
steps.text: warm orange (carnelian) or iridescent (labradorite); let the eye rest on its color or sheen

steps.name: Bring attention to the sacral center
steps.text: lower belly, below the navel — the center traditionally associated with creative origination

steps.name: Picture a warm fountain rising
steps.text: orange water pooling in the lower belly, rising as a fountain up to the brow and out through the crown

steps.name: When an idea arrives, do not grip it
steps.text: just notice — gripping kills the flow; let it pass and another will come

steps.name: Close by writing one line
steps.text: before lifting the stone, write down the first simple phrase, color, or image — anchor it before the mind closes

crystal_rationale.carnelian: 透橙红色蜡状光泽作 gentle activation；古埃及 / 罗马传统中 'stone of creativity'（GemSelect 等多源）
crystal_rationale.labradorite: labradorescence 蓝/金闪光作 'surprise flash' 视觉 — 创意 'aha' 的视觉对应；Crystals.com / MooncatCrystals 推荐
crystal_rationale.citrine: 暖黄作 'clear the fog' 传统；mental space clearing 支持
crystal_rationale.lapis-lazuli: 深蓝含金铁矿斑点；历史 'stone of artists / poets'（古希腊罗马传统）；third-eye 触发
crystal_rationale.blue-apatite: 蓝绿色；现代传统中 inspiration / motivation 主题（AngelGrotto / MuseMoonstone 推荐）
crystal_rationale.clear-quartz: 中性无色作 blank-canvas 联想；'master' 传统作 all-purpose creative companion
crystal_rationale.moonstone: adularescence 浮动光作 'dreamy / vision' 视觉；新想法联想

faq_seeds: What are the best crystals for creativity meditation?
How do I meditate for creative inspiration?
Which chakra is for creativity?
Can crystals really help with creative block?
Which crystal should I keep on my desk?
How long should a creativity meditation be?
Should I meditate before or during creative work?
Do different art forms call for different crystals?
mainpages.eastern_note: 瑜伽：svadhisthana (sacral) 为 creativity / emotion 中心；印度传统 ajna (third-eye) 为 insight / vision 中心；藏传 arts 传统（如 thangka painting）以 carnelian / lapis 为传统颜料原料 — mineral 与 arts 历史关联深厚。道家中 'water generating wood'（水生木）= 创意流动五行类比（非医疗）。
mainpages.differentiation_from_existing: vs focus (M1): focus 是 single-pointed concentration（box breathing + third-eye + steady light）；creativity 是 open flowing attention（flowing breath + sacral + rising fountain）；vs manifestation (M6): manifestation 是 goal-oriented，creativity 是 process-oriented

mainpages.title: Crystals for Gratitude Meditation: 7 Stones for a Thankfulness Practice
mainpages.h1: How to Use Crystals for a Gratitude Meditation
mainpages.definition: A gratitude meditation uses warm-toned or heart-centered stones, a slow receiving breath, and a deliberate naming of small specific things you appreciate to deepen a felt sense of thankfulness. This guide covers seven stones traditionally paired with gratitude practice.

scene.pain_point: taking things for granted, comparative scarcity mindset, difficulty feeling warmth toward what is already here
scene.breath: receiving breath (slow inhale as if receiving a gift, gentle exhale with a soft half-smile)
scene.hold_hand: both hands cupping the stone at the heart center
scene.visualization: a warm golden honey-colored light filling the chest with each named thing, slowly expanding outward
scene.duration: 8-15 min, ideally at end of day or week
scene.affirmation: I notice what is already here, and let it warm me.
scene.compliance_phrasing: thankfulness practice / appreciation cultivation (NOT attracts abundance / guarantees prosperity)

steps.name: Settle with the receiving breath
steps.text: slow inhale as if receiving a small gift, gentle exhale with a soft half-smile — repeat five rounds

steps.name: Cup the stone in both hands at the heart
steps.text: rest both palms around the stone, hands at the center of the chest

steps.name: Name three small specific things
steps.text: not 'health / family / job' — instead 'the warmth of the cup this morning', 'the colour of the sky at 4pm', 'a kind word from a coworker'

steps.name: Let each one warm the chest
steps.text: with each named thing, picture a little honey-colored light collecting at the heart

steps.name: When the mind argues ('yes but'), do not fight
steps.text: just return to the next small thing — gratitude is a noticing practice, not a forced feeling

steps.name: Close by holding the stone to the heart
steps.text: press it gently to the sternum once, set it down, and let the warmth carry forward

crystal_rationale.citrine: 暖黄作 'sun-warmth' 视觉；传统跨文化 'abundance / positivity' 联想（注：abundance framing 不等于 manifest wealth）
crystal_rationale.rose-quartz: 柔和粉色 + palm stone 形状契合 heart center；传统跨文化 gentleness / love 主题
crystal_rationale.amethyst: 传统 calm 主题；softening the 'yes but' 内在争论
crystal_rationale.clear-quartz: 中性无色作 'clear lens to see what is here' 联想；'master' 传统作 all-purpose
crystal_rationale.green-aventurine: 淡绿柔和；heart-secondary + opportunity / growth 传统
crystal_rationale.sunstone: 日光效应闪光作 'small joys / sparkle' 视觉
crystal_rationale.moonstone: adularescence 浮动光作 'soft surprise / new eyes for the ordinary' 联想

faq_seeds: What are the best crystals for gratitude meditation?
How is gratitude meditation different from manifestation?
What do I name during a gratitude meditation?
Which chakra is for gratitude?
How long should a gratitude meditation be?
Can gratitude meditation feel forced — what then?
Which crystal should I keep on my nightstand for gratitude?
Should I journal before or after a gratitude meditation?
mainpages.eastern_note: 佛教：gārava (尊敬 / 感恩) 与 kataññu (知恩) 是 Pali 传统；藏传 tsog feast（供养 / 感恩仪式）；道家中 '知足'（知止足）—gratitude 在东方传统中常作为德目而非独立冥想。基督教传统 eucharist 字根 = thanksgiving（仅作文化参照，非宗教推广）。
mainpages.differentiation_from_existing: vs manifestation (M6): manifestation 是 active goal-aligned intention；gratitude 是 noticing what is already here（passive receiving）；vs self-love (E3): self-love 是 self-directed warmth，gratitude 是 outward-directed appreciation

mainpages.title: Crystals for Grief Meditation: 7 Gentle Stones for Loss
mainpages.h1: How to Use Crystals for a Grief Meditation
mainpages.definition: A grief meditation uses soft, grounding, or gently protective stones alongside a witnessing breath (no fixing) to hold space for the natural waves of loss without rushing them. This guide covers seven stones traditionally offered as gentle companions for mourning.

scene.pain_point: waves of grief, heaviness in the chest, feeling ungrounded by loss, difficulty facing memories
scene.breath: wave breath (inhale as the wave rises — do not resist; exhale as it falls — let it pass)
scene.hold_hand: left over the heart center, or both hands cupping a heavier grounding stone in the lap
scene.scan_focus: heart center and the soles of the feet (the latter for ground)
scene.visualization: a wide slow tide coming in and going out — no resistance to the wave, no chasing it either
scene.duration: 10-20 min, on difficult days or anniversaries
scene.affirmation: I let the wave move through, and I remain.
scene.compliance_phrasing: gentle companion for loss / holding-space practice (NOT cures grief / treats depression / heals trauma / processes PTSD — grief is a natural response, not a disorder to fix)

steps.name: Settle with the wave breath
steps.text: no counting, no forcing — let the inhale rise like a wave, the exhale fall; just witness

steps.name: Place one stone over the heart, a heavier one in the lap
steps.text: left hand on the heart stone (rose quartz or smoky quartz); heavier grounding stone (black tourmaline or hematite) resting in the lap

steps.name: Feel the feet on the floor
steps.text: grief lifts us out of the body — press the feet gently, return to the contact

steps.name: If a wave rises, do not resist or chase
steps.text: let it move through like a tide; the stone's weight is your anchor while it passes

steps.name: If a memory comes, let it
steps.text: do not analyze — just witness it like a passing cloud; return to the breath when ready

steps.name: Close gently and slowly
steps.text: do not rush to stand; press the feet, place a hand on the heart, transition softly — grief work is tiring

crystal_rationale.rose-quartz: 柔和粉色 + palm stone 形状；传统跨文化 gentle comfort / heart-holding 联想（CharmsofLight / WildMountain 推荐）
crystal_rationale.smoky-quartz: 半透棕灰；传统 release + grounding 双重联想（MuseMoonstone / SaskiaHeydon 推荐深色石短期使用）
crystal_rationale.amethyst: 传统 calm / spiritual support；helps soften without numbing
crystal_rationale.moonstone: adularescence 浮动光；'new beginnings' 传统联想（CharmsofLight WildMountain 列为 grief stone）
crystal_rationale.black-tourmaline: 重量感（高比重）；grounding anchor in storm（WhalersLocker / 普遍推荐）
crystal_rationale.rhodonite: 粉黑对比；现代传统 inner wound / compassion for self in loss
crystal_rationale.lepidolite: 含天然锂云母（科学事实，非药理断言）；柔和淡紫色；现代传统 calm in grief

mainpages.eastern_note: 佛教：maranānussati (死随念) 是南传十随念之一；藏传 bardo（中阴）传统对死亡 / 失去有完整修法；净土宗 / 禅宗皆有丧祭仪轨。注意 framing：东方传统对死亡的态度是修行的一部分（非'治愈' grief）—此页保持 secular 'holding-space' 立场，传统术语仅作文化参照。
mainpages.differentiation_from_existing: vs emotional (M3): emotional 是 general held feelings release（sighing breath + flowing water）；grief 特指 loss / mourning（wave breath + no fixing + grounding）；vs shadow-work (E9): shadow 是整合 suppressed parts，grief 是 holding space for loss

mainpages.title: Full Moon Meditation with Crystals: 7 Stones & a Release Practice
mainpages.h1: How to Do a Full Moon Meditation with Crystals
mainpages.definition: A full moon meditation uses light-catching, white, or iridescent stones at the peak of the lunar cycle to support a release practice — letting go of what has culminated and no longer serves. This guide covers seven stones traditionally paired with full moon ritual.

scene.pain_point: accumulated tension over the cycle, difficulty letting go of completed things, sleep disruption near full moons
scene.breath: releasing breath (inhale slowly, long extended exhale as if letting something fall away)
scene.hold_hand: left, with the stone placed where moonlight can touch it (windowsill or outdoors)
scene.scan_focus: crown of the head and the heart center
scene.visualization: a wide bright moonlight pouring down through the crown, washing accumulated tension down and out through the soles of the feet
scene.duration: 10-20 min on or near the full moon night
scene.affirmation: I release what is complete, and trust the next cycle.
scene.compliance_phrasing: lunar-cycle release ritual / cyclical reflection practice (NOT guarantees manifestation / amplifies energy — frame as traditional ritual, not magical claim)

steps.name: Settle where moonlight reaches
steps.text: windowsill, garden, or any spot under the night sky — even an open window counts

steps.name: Place or hold the stone in moonlight
steps.text: let the stone sit in the moonlight too; many traditions hold this also cleanses it (parallel practice to our cleansing timer)

steps.name: Settle with the releasing breath
steps.text: slow inhale through the nose, long extended exhale through the mouth as if releasing — repeat eight rounds

steps.name: Name what is complete this cycle
steps.text: silently name three things that have run their course — projects, worries, patterns; no judgment, just naming

steps.name: Picture moonlight washing through
steps.text: bright white light entering through the crown, dissolving what was named, flowing out through the soles

steps.name: Close by thanking the cycle
steps.text: place the stone down, briefly thank what is releasing, transition gently to rest

crystal_rationale.moonstone: adularescence 浮动光直接类比月光；跨文化 lunar / new beginnings 传统（EmpressWolf / GoldenLotusMala 推荐）
crystal_rationale.selenite: 希腊语 selene = moon（词源）；半透长柱形作 'moonlight in mineral form' 视觉；'self-cleansing' 传统（ChalmersGems 等推荐为 full moon crystal）
crystal_rationale.clear-quartz: 中性无色透光作 moonlight amplifier 联想；'master' 传统 all-purpose
crystal_rationale.amethyst: 紫色 crown 联想；TinyRituals 等推荐 full moon charging 组合
crystal_rationale.labradorite: 蓝金闪光作 'surprise illumination' 视觉；满月 intuition / vision 传统
crystal_rationale.howlite: 白色多孔；calm + sleep support 满月（满月常 sleep 受扰）
crystal_rationale.smoky-quartz: 半透棕灰；release + grounding 双重联想，配合 'letting go' 主题

mainpages.eastern_note: 藏传：每月十五 (Purnima / 满月) 为吉祥日，Tsog（供养荟供）传统在此日修法；印度 Purnima vrat（满月斋）传统；道教十五 '望日'（朔望概念，月相术语）。注意：本页保持 cultural-ritual framing（'traditional practice'）非 magical claim；满月与 sleep 的研究有少量证据（2013 Cajochen 等）但不强 — 保持 'some people report' 中立措辞。
mainpages.differentiation_from_existing: vs manifestation (M6): manifestation 是 personal goal alignment；full-moon 是 cyclical release ritual（不同 timing / framing）；vs gratitude (E6): gratitude 是 noticing，full-moon 是 releasing（一来一去）

mainpages.title: Crystals for Shadow Work Meditation: 7 Stones for Inner Integration
mainpages.h1: How to Use Crystals for a Shadow Work Meditation
secondary_kw: crystals for inner healing and reflection
mainpages.definition: A shadow work meditation uses dark, reflective, or iridescent stones alongside a witnessing, non-judgmental attention to gently look at the parts of yourself that have been hidden, suppressed, or pushed away — not to fix them, but to integrate. This guide covers seven stones traditionally paired with this kind of depth practice.

scene.pain_point: avoiding uncomfortable parts of self, projecting onto others, patterns repeating despite awareness, feeling stuck in old stories
scene.breath: witness breath (slow natural breath, no counting, no forcing — just observing what arises without trying to change it)
scene.hold_hand: left (the receiving side, allowing what is hidden to surface)
scene.scan_focus: root (ground for safety) and the heart (compassion for what arises)
scene.visualization: no fixed image — instead, a dark protective cave with a small lamp; whatever arises is met there, witnessed, not driven out
scene.duration: 15-25 min (longer than other scenes — depth work needs time and should not be rushed)
scene.affirmation: I am willing to see, and what I see, I welcome.
scene.compliance_phrasing: inner reflection / integration practice (NOT treats trauma / processes PTSD / heals deep wounds — shadow work in the Jungian sense is self-exploration, not therapy; for clinical concerns, work with a qualified therapist)

steps.name: Settle with the witness breath
steps.text: no count, no forcing — natural breath, just observing the inhale and exhale for a few rounds to arrive

steps.name: Hold the stone in the left palm
steps.text: dark reflective (obsidian, tourmaline) or iridescent (labradorite); feel its weight and surface

steps.name: Press the feet into the floor and feel grounded
steps.text: shadow work needs safety first — root down before going inward

steps.name: Silently ask: 'What part of me am I avoiding?'
steps.text: then wait — do not answer with the mind; let an image, feeling, or memory surface on its own

steps.name: When something arises, do not fix or argue
steps.text: just witness it like meeting a stranger — 'I see you'; the stone's weight is your anchor; if it gets too much, open your eyes and press your feet

steps.name: Close by placing a hand on the heart
steps.text: before setting the stone down, place your free hand on your heart and silently say 'I welcome all of me' — transition gently, drink water, rest

crystal_rationale.black-obsidian: 天然火山玻璃，反射表面作 'mirror of the soul' 视觉；传统跨文化 shadow / truth-facing（CrystalHappenings / RocksWithSass / 多源推荐）
crystal_rationale.labradorite: 蓝金闪光作 'flash of insight from the hidden' 视觉；protection during inner work（LoveOfRocks / EnergyMuse 推荐）
crystal_rationale.smoky-quartz: 半透棕灰；grounding + release 双重联想 — shadow work 后稳定化的传统石
crystal_rationale.amethyst: 紫色 calm / spiritual insight 传统；witness without numbing 支持
crystal_rationale.black-tourmaline: 重量 + grounding；safety anchor during depth work（普遍推荐）
crystal_rationale.moonstone: adularescence 浮动光；'shadow moonstone' (black moonstone) 是 shadow work 特殊变体（EnergyMuse / GoddessProvisions 推荐）
crystal_rationale.malachite: 绿色带纹；transformation 传统（LoveOfRocks 列为 shadow work stone）；注意：含水洗敏感，保养需谨慎

mainpages.eastern_note: 西方：Carl Jung 的 'shadow' (Schatten) 概念源于分析心理学 — 本页 framing 主以此为根。东方平行参照（非等价）：藏传 Chöd（施身法 — Machig Labdrön 传统，'feeding the demons' 即面对而非驱除内心阴暗）；南传 asubha bhāvanā（不净观）与 defilements (kilesa) 的 sati。注意：shadow work 是 Western psychology 概念，本页保持 Jungian 立场不强行东方对应。
mainpages.differentiation_from_existing: vs emotional (M3): emotional 是 general held feelings release（sighing breath + flowing water）；shadow 是 intentional integration of suppressed self（witness breath + cave）；vs grief (E7): grief 是 holding space for loss，shadow 是 meeting what was hidden

crystal_pool_extensions._note: 以下为 9 新场景引用、但不在 meditation-knowledge.json 原 crystal_pool 中的晶体；按 390 库常见英文 slug；正式生产前需 1.crystal-meaning/ json 核对

blue-lace-agate.name: Blue Lace Agate
blue-lace-agate.science_angle: Mohs 6.5-7, translucent blue with white banding (microcrystalline quartz)
blue-lace-agate.tradition_angle: modern tradition associates soft blue with calm speech and the throat center
blue-lace-agate.mindfulness_angle: soft blue bands as a calming visual anchor; palm stone shape common
blue-lace-agate.safety: durable; brief water safe; moonlight/selenite/sound safe

sunstone.name: Sunstone
sunstone.science_angle: Mohs 6-6.5, displays aventurescence (sparkle from copper/hematite inclusions)
sunstone.tradition_angle: associated with sun imagery, vitality, and confidence in modern traditions
sunstone.mindfulness_angle: warm sparkle as a visual cue for confidence and morning activation
sunstone.safety: durable; brief water safe; moonlight/selenite/sound safe

lapis-lazuli.name: Lapis Lazuli
lapis-lazuli.mineral: Complex rock: lazurite + calcite + pyrite + sodalite
lapis-lazuli.science_angle: Mohs 5-5.5, deep blue with gold flecks (pyrite) and white veining (calcite)
lapis-lazuli.tradition_angle: historic pigment (ultramarine), used in ancient Egyptian and Renaissance art; associated with vision and insight
lapis-lazuli.mindfulness_angle: deep blue with gold flecks as a 'night-sky' visual anchor for third-eye focus
lapis-lazuli.safety: relatively soft and porous; keep dry (avoid water/salt); moonlight/selenite/sound safe

red-jasper.name: Red Jasper
red-jasper.science_angle: Mohs 6.5-7, opaque red from iron oxide; microcrystalline
red-jasper.tradition_angle: associated across cultures with endurance, grounding, and steady energy
red-jasper.mindfulness_angle: warm earth-red as a visual anchor for grounded steadiness
red-jasper.safety: durable; brief water safe; moonlight/selenite/sound safe

green-aventurine.name: Green Aventurine
green-aventurine.science_angle: Mohs 6.5-7, green from fuchsite (chrome-bearing mica), slight aventurescence
green-aventurine.tradition_angle: modern tradition associates green aventurine with opportunity and growth
green-aventurine.mindfulness_angle: soft green as a calming heart-secondary visual anchor
green-aventurine.safety: durable; brief water safe; moonlight/selenite/sound safe

blue-apatite.name: Blue Apatite
blue-apatite.tradition_angle: modern tradition associates blue apatite with inspiration and motivation
blue-apatite.mindfulness_angle: blue-green translucent tone as a creative visual anchor
blue-apatite.safety: slightly soft; keep dry; moonlight/selenite/sound safe

rhodonite.name: Rhodonite
rhodonite.science_angle: Mohs 5.5-6.5, pink with black manganese oxide veining
rhodonite.tradition_angle: modern tradition associates rhodonite with self-forgiveness and inner wound healing
rhodonite.mindfulness_angle: pink-black contrast as a focal for holding both softness and weight
rhodonite.safety: durable; brief water safe; moonlight/selenite/sound safe

black-obsidian.name: Black Obsidian
black-obsidian.mineral: Volcanic glass (amorphous SiO₂), from rapidly cooled lava
black-obsidian.science_angle: Mohs 5-5.5 (softer than quartz), conchoidal fracture produces razor-sharp edges; mirrors were historically cut from it
black-obsidian.tradition_angle: used in Mesoamerican (Aztec) cultures for mirrors and ritual; modern tradition associates it with shadow-facing and truth-seeing
black-obsidian.mindfulness_angle: reflective dark surface as a 'mirror' for inner reflection
black-obsidian.safety: brittle (can chip); keep dry; moonlight/selenite/sound safe — handle polished pieces, not raw (sharp edges)

malachite.name: Malachite
malachite.science_angle: Mohs 3.5-4 (soft), vivid green with concentric banding; copper-bearing (handle dry, wash hands after)
malachite.tradition_angle: historic pigment, used in Egyptian and Russian ornament; modern tradition associates it with transformation
malachite.mindfulness_angle: vivid banded green as a focal for transformation imagery
malachite.safety: soft and water-sensitive (copper-bearing — keep dry, do not soak, wash hands after handling raw); moonlight/selenite/sound safe — safer in polished/tumbled form

compliance_notes.medical_compliance_summary: anxiety/grief/shadow-work 三个场景严格 medical framing：用 'support/wind-down/holding-space/integration' 非 'cures/treats/heals'；FAQ 显式声明 'crystals are not a substitute for professional treatment / therapy'
compliance_notes.magical_claim_compliance: full-moon / morning / gratitude 三个场景保持 'traditional ritual practice' framing，不写 'amplifies energy / guarantees manifestation / attracts wealth'；eastern_note 注明文化来源非断言
compliance_notes.differentiation_check: 9 场景 breath 全部差异化：anxiety=coherent(4-6)/morning=awakening/self-love=heart/confidence=steady-power/creativity=flowing/gratitude=receiving/grief=wave/full-moon=releasing/shadow=witness；9 场景 chakra 全部差异化（heart 三个但 breath/visualization/hand 不同）
